title: Main aspects of boosting the contribution of PDO Iberian ham to the sustainability and resilience of the Sierra Morena mountains
subtitle: Participatory appraisal of vulnerability and performance of value chains
description: A practice abstract outlining key actions to enhance the sustainability and resilience of Sierra Morena through the PDO Iberian ham Los Pedroches value chain. It highlights product differentiation, supportive regulations for small farmers, and improved knowledge exchange as essential strategies.
